projects.name: Pokedemon FizzBuzz
projects.description: FizzBuzz variant that prints Poke for multiples of 3, mon for multiples of 5, and Pokemon for multiples of 15

projects.description: Introduction to Mayflower game engine with Cat, Dog, and Yarn actors on a bluebonnet background

projects.name: Mayflower Score Display
projects.description: Mayflower world with score and lives display, featuring Cat, Dog, and Yarn with UI elements

projects.name: Mayflower Cat & Ninja
projects.description: Mayflower world with Cat and NinjaGirl characters introducing multiple animated actor types

projects.name: Mayflower Multi-Actors
projects.description: Mayflower world with multiple character types: Cat, Dog, Jack, and Ninja demonstrating actor composition

projects.name: Mayflower Tile World
projects.description: Tile-based Mayflower world with ground, blocks, yarn, and cat placement using a 2D tile grid

projects.name: Mayflower Platformer
projects.description: Platformer game with gravity, blocks, and animated Ninja character using GravityActor

projects.name: Custom ArrayList
projects.description: Custom implementation of a dynamic array (ArrayList) data structure with add, get, remove, size

projects.name: Custom LinkedList
projects.description: Custom generic LinkedList implementation with node-based linked list operations

projects.name: Map Interface
projects.description: Map data structure interface with key-value operations: put, get, remove, containsKey, keySet

projects.name: Word Count
projects.description: Word frequency counter that reads text files and counts word occurrences using a Map

projects.name: HashMap Implementation
projects.description: Hash table implementation of Map interface using array of ArrayLists for collision handling

projects.description: Tic-Tac-Toe game with Mayflower graphical interface, playable 3x3 board with win detection

projects.description: Network client for connecting to a Tic-Tac-Toe server for multiplayer gameplay

projects.name: Tic-Tac-Toe Client (Alt)
projects.description: Alternative Tic-Tac-Toe network client implementation

projects.name: Royal Family Tree
projects.description: Tree data structure using TNode - builds genealogy tree from data and finds paths

projects.name: Tic-Tac-Toe MinMax AI
projects.description: Tic-Tac-Toe with unbeatable MinMax AI opponent, network server, and GUI client

projects.name: Graph Implementation
projects.description: Graph and weighted graph implementations using adjacency lists

projects.name: Recursive Circles
projects.description: Recursive drawing using Java AWT - draws nested circles using recursion

projects.name: Donkey Kong Platformer
projects.description: Full Donkey Kong-style platformer with multiple levels, Cat protagonist, DK enemy, coins, ladders
